childhood.familyBackground: Born 1967 in Zhejiang Province. Family with modest background.
childhood.education: Radio engineering degree from Zhejiang Shuren University
childhood.earlyLife: Started career in electronics and surveillance. Developed expertise in security and surveillance solutions.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 전자 및 감시 분야에서 경력 시작. 보안 및 감시 솔루션 전문성 개발.

careerTimeline.event: Co-founded Zhejiang Dahua Technology for security surveillance solutions
careerTimeline.eventKo: 보안 감시 솔루션을 위해 저장성 다화 기술 공동창립

careerTimeline.event: Dahua expanded globally to 180+ countries with advanced surveillance technology
careerTimeline.eventKo: 다화가 고급 감시 기술로 180개 이상 국가로 글로벌 확장

careerTimeline.event: Co-founded Zhejiang Leapmotor Technology electric vehicle manufacturer
careerTimeline.eventKo: 저장성 리프모터 기술 전기자동차 제조사 공동창립

careerTimeline.event: Second-largest shareholder of Leapmotor Technology EV company
careerTimeline.eventKo: Leapmotor Technology 전기자동차 회사의 제2 대주주

personalTraits.knownFor: Founding Dahua surveillance giant, global security technology leadership, EV industry entry
personalTraits.knownForKo: 다화 감시 거대기업 설립, 글로벌 보안 기술 리더십, 전기자동차 산업 진출
personalTraits.controversies: Dahua placed on US investment blacklist over allegations of human rights abuses and government surveillance ties
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 다화가 인권 침해 혐의 및 정부 감시 연계로 미국 투자 블랙리스트에 등재
